name: Tentative Carryback and Refund Adjustment

eligibility.description: Available to taxpayers with a net operating loss, net capital loss, or unused business credit who file Form 1139 (corporations) or Form 1045 (individuals) within 12 months of the loss year.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows taxpayers to obtain a quick refund (typically within 90 days) by applying a net operating loss, capital loss, or unused business credit to prior tax years.
